---
name: 💡 Suggest a change
about: Propose a new rule, a new handbook, or an edit to an existing one
title: ""
labels: suggestion
---

<!-- Skills demand evidence over opinion — so do issues. -->

## What should change

Which handbook and which line/section? What should it say instead?

## Why — with evidence

What does an agent do today that a senior engineer wouldn't (or vice versa)?
Show the moment it went wrong: a transcript, a diff, a reproduction, or a citation.

## Anything else

Trade-offs, alternatives you considered, or open questions.
